cases.title: Staff check-in within CheckinOpenAt..CheckinCloseAt records valid check-in
preconditions: Event is InProgress with configured checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt where openAt < closeAt
Fixed clock now is strictly between checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Participant has registration in Registered state with no prior valid check-in
Authenticated OrganizerStaff or OrganizerAdmin with check-in capability
steps: Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, actorContext) at in-window time
Query checkin_records and registration state for the participant
cases.expected: CheckinRecord persisted with non-null checkinAt timestamp; registration transitions to CheckedIn; BR-10 satisfied because check-in occurred within the configured window

cases.title: BR-10 maps to CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED validation error code
preconditions: Domain rule catalog loaded per validation rules doc
steps: Resolve RULE_TO_ERROR_CODE for business rule BR-10
Assert BUSINESS_RULE_IDS.BR_10 equals BR-10
cases.expected: BR-10 resolves to VALIDATION_ERROR_CODES.CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; mapping is stable and deterministic per validation rules catalog

cases.title: Check-in window validator accepts time inside CheckinOpenAt..CheckinCloseAt
preconditions: Configured checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt with openAt < closeAt per TimeWindow invariant
Fixed clock now set to a time between openAt and closeAt
steps: Call check-in window validator (e.g. assertCheckinWindowOpen or isWithinCheckinWindow) with in-window now
cases.expected: Validator returns success (true or no throw), permitting check-in processing per BR-10

cases.title: Check-in before CheckinOpenAt is rejected
preconditions: Event is InProgress with checkinOpenAt in the future relative to fixed clock now
Participant has Registered registration with no prior check-in
Authenticated staff actor with check-in capability
steps: Set fixed clock to a time strictly before checkinOpenAt
Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, actorContext)
Query checkin_records and registration state
cases.expected: Request fails with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; no CheckinRecord persisted; registration remains Registered

cases.title: Check-in after CheckinCloseAt is rejected
preconditions: Event is InProgress or Completed with checkinCloseAt in the past relative to fixed clock now
Participant has Registered registration with no prior check-in
Authenticated staff actor with check-in capability
steps: Set fixed clock to a time strictly after checkinCloseAt
Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, actorContext)
Verify database state for check-in and registration
cases.expected: Request fails with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; no CheckinRecord created; registration state unchanged (Registered)

cases.title: POST checkins succeeds when current time is within check-in window
preconditions: E2E fixture event InProgress with active check-in window containing current (or simulated) time
Registered participant with valid registrationId
Staff or admin JWT with scope for the event
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with body { registrationId } and Authorization bearer token
Read response body and registration state
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with non-null checkinAt, registrationState CheckedIn; check-in recorded within BR-10 window bounds

cases.title: POST checkins returns CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED when outside check-in window
preconditions: E2E fixture event InProgress with check-in window not containing current (or simulated) time
Registered participant with valid registrationId
Staff or admin JWT with scope for the event
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with body { registrationId } while outside configured window
Parse error envelope from response body
cases.expected: HTTP 422 (or 409 per API contract) with error.code CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED and user-safe message; no successful check-in payload returned

cases.title: POST self-checkin succeeds only when within check-in window
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event InProgress with active check-in window
Authenticated participant JWT for Registered registration with no prior check-in
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin with participant Authorization bearer token at in-window time
Repeat with clock or fixture moved outside window
cases.expected: In-window request returns HTTP 200 with checkinAt and CheckedIn state; out-of-window request rejected with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED per BR-10

cases.title: Organizer check-in UI blocks submission when check-in window is closed
preconditions: OrganizerStaff logged in on event check-in screen
Event InProgress but current time is outside checkinOpenAt..checkinCloseAt
Registered participant visible in attendance list
steps: Navigate to organizer check-in view for the event
Attempt to check in a registered participant via UI control
Observe inline or toast error messaging
cases.expected: UI does not record check-in; participant sees window-closed feedback consistent with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED server semantics

cases.title: Check-in at CheckinOpenAt boundary is accepted when window policy includes open instant
preconditions: Event configured with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Fixed clock set exactly to checkinOpenAt
Registered participant with no prior check-in
steps: Submit staff check-in at the open boundary instant
Query CheckinRecord and registration state
cases.expected: Check-in succeeds with persisted checkinAt at or after checkinOpenAt; registration transitions to CheckedIn per configured open-boundary rule

cases.title: Check-in at CheckinCloseAt boundary is rejected when window policy excludes close instant
preconditions: Event configured with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Fixed clock set exactly to checkinCloseAt
Registered participant with no prior check-in
steps: Submit staff or self check-in at the close boundary instant
Query CheckinRecord and registration state
cases.expected: Check-in rejected with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED per configured close-boundary rule; registration stays Registered

cases.title: Out-of-window rejection preserves Registered state for attendance reconciliation
preconditions: Event InProgress with closed check-in window (now after checkinCloseAt)
Registered participant never checked in
Event completion workflow available in test harness
steps: Attempt check-in after window close and confirm rejection
Run event completion / attendance finalization for the event
Query registration terminal state for the participant
cases.expected: No CheckinRecord exists; after completion participant is marked Absent (not Attended) because BR-10 prevented valid check-in

cases.title: Out-of-window check-in does not consume duplicate-check-in guard for later in-window attempt
preconditions: Event InProgress; fixed clock first set before checkinOpenAt then moved inside window
Registered participant with no prior valid check-in
steps: Attempt check-in before window opens and confirm CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED
Advance clock to in-window time
Attempt check-in again for the same registration
cases.expected: First attempt rejected with no CheckinRecord; second in-window attempt succeeds with CheckedIn state; BR-11 not triggered by failed out-of-window attempt

cases.title: Duplicate POST checkins outside window still return CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED not CHECKIN_ALREADY_RECORDED
preconditions: Event outside check-in window
Registered participant with no prior check-in
Staff JWT and two distinct Idempotency-Key values
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins twice with different Idempotency-Key headers while window is closed
Inspect both error responses
cases.expected: Both attempts return CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; BR-10 window guard applies before BR-11 duplicate check-in evaluation

cases.title: TimeWindow value object rejects invalid config where checkinOpenAt >= checkinCloseAt
preconditions: Event rule config with checkinOpenAt equal to or after checkinCloseAt
steps: Attempt to construct or validate TimeWindow(openAt, closeAt) for check-in configuration
Observe validation outcome before any check-in request
cases.expected: Configuration validation fails per domain model invariant openAt < closeAt; no check-in window can be evaluated until config is corrected

cases.title: Check-in window validation runs before duplicate check-in guard in pipeline
preconditions: Registered participant with existing valid CheckinRecord (BR-11 would apply)
Event InProgress but current time outside checkinOpenAt..checkinCloseAt
steps: Attempt second check-in for the same registration while window is closed
Inspect error code on failure
cases.expected: Failure code is CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED (not CHECKIN_ALREADY_RECORDED), confirming pipeline step 2 (event check-in window) executes before step 3 (existing valid check-in check)

cases.title: BR-10 window evaluation is deterministic for identical inputs
preconditions: Fixed checkinOpenAt, checkinCloseAt, and now timestamp fixture
steps: Evaluate BR-10 check-in window guard twice with identical inputs
Compare outcome, error code, and message
cases.expected: Both evaluations produce identical accept/reject outcome; same inputs always yield same output per determinism requirements in validation rules doc

cases.title: Fixed clock abstraction drives all BR-10 window boundary tests consistently
preconditions: Test harness provides injectable clock abstraction per testing plan deterministic controls
Event with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt boundaries
steps: Set clock to one second before open, attempt check-in, observe rejection
Set clock to in-window, attempt check-in, observe success
Set clock to one second after close, attempt check-in on a fresh registration, observe rejection
cases.expected: All three outcomes are reproducible across test runs with identical clock fixtures; no flaky time-dependent BR-10 results
